package rulecoverage

func NegativeCsvWriterFlushPerRow() string {
    ruleID := "csv_writer_flush_per_row"
    family := "hot_path"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "csv.Writer.Flush() called inside per-row loops, reducing buffering effectiveness."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
